{{Quote|Ash was roguish, charming, and kind, and now he was dead.|Vydel Dir'Nul|<ref name="Dark Journey (comic)">{{Tales|17|Dark Journey (comic story)}}</ref>}}
'''Ash B'risko''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].

==Biography==
[[File:AshBriskoDead-Tales17.jpg|thumb|left|170px|Ash B'risko killed by Kardem]]
Around the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Ash met [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Vydel Dir'Nul]] when she was on a bodyguard assignment for the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]]. She fell in love with him; however, when she saw him flirting with a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancing girl, she was consumed by jealousy and [[Death/Legends|killed]] them both.

Dir'Nul subsequently developed [[multiple personality disorder]], creating the alternate persona of a male [[Dark Jedi/Legends|dark jedi]] named Kardem. As Kardem, she continued to murder female Twi'leks, while her original personality believed she was hunting Kardem to bring an end to his killing spree and avenge Ash. 

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|In the foreground, we can see Vydel talking with a rugged handsome pilot named ASH B'RISKO as he is loading some gear into the cargo hatch of his ship. He looks like Bruce Campbell, but with a scar running down the side of his face, starting at the outside corner of his left eye.|Script for ''Dark Journey''|<ref name="email1">{{EmailCite|email=Wookieepedia:Email/Ash B'risko|creator=[[Jason Hall]]|date=2011-11-18}}</ref>}}
[[File:AshVsAsh.png|thumb|right|Ash B'risko and the actor upon whom his likeness was based.]]
Ash B'risko shares parts of his name with two characters played by [[Wikipedia:Bruce Campbell|Bruce Campbell]], the protagonist [[Wikipedia:Ash Williams|Ashley J. "Ash" Williams]] from the [[Wikipedia:The Evil Dead (franchise)|''Evil Dead'']] film series, and the title character [[Wikipedia:Brisco County, Jr. (character)|Brisco County, Jr.]] from the television series [[Wikipedia:The Adventures of Brisco County, Jr.|''The Adventures of Brisco County, Jr.'']] This was a [[Tuckerization|deliberate reference]] to the actor, according to [[Jason Hall]], writer of "[[Dark Journey (comic story)|Dark Journey]]."<ref name="email1" />
